name: Brown Sugar Angel Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
3. Combine cake flour and 1 cup brown sugar in a bowl.
4. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar and salt until foamy.
5. Gradually add the second cup of brown sugar to the beaten egg whites. Continue beating until stiff peaks form. Add vanilla and blend well.
6. Divide the flour-brown sugar mixture into 4 portions.
7. Using a large rubber spatula, fold each portion into the batter separately. Gently lift the meringue up and roll it over onto itself. Fold just until no traces of dry ingredients are visible.
8. Gently push the batter into the prepared pan. Make 5 or 6 vertical cuts through the batter with a long, sharp knife to remove large air pockets.
9. Bake for 45 minutes, or until the top of the cake springs back when lightly touched with a finger.
10. As soon as the cake is removed from the oven, immediately invert the pan. If the pan does not have legs, place the center tube over the neck of a heavy bottle. Do not remove the cake from the pan until it is completely cool (at least an hour).
11. Dust with sifted powdered sugar or frost with your favorite icing.
